home.title: I'm Edwin González
home.bio: Developer with a deep passion for creating visually stunning and highly functional web applications. 💻👓

aboutMe.title: About me
aboutMe.bio: I'm Edwin González, a frontend developer from El Salvador with +3 years of experience. My journey in web development began with a fascination with how websites are created, how technology works, and the desire to create perfect digital tools and products. Since then, I have honed my skills in various frontend technologies and methodologies, always with the goal of delivering high-quality, effective solutions.

jobs.date: January 2021 ~ Present ● London, England, United Kingdom
jobs.title: Frontend Software Engineer at Fitune • Fitness & Wellness Software
bullets: Collaborate with other team members and stakeholders
Assure that all user input is validated before submitting to back-end
Building reusable code for future use
Maintaining brand consistency throughout the design
Define how the application looks and how it works
Translate UI/UX design wireframes to actual code
Continuous development of applications with technologies such as: Vue, RoR and Js

jobs.title: Front End Developer at Elaniin
bullets: Build web applications with different technologies such as: ReactJS and Vuejs, that are friendly with responsive design
Bringing mock-ups to life using HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Collaborating closely with the team to support projects during phases of delivery
Maintaining an organized workflow using a project management tool (like GitLab)
Testing to identify bugs and technical issues before and after deploying

jobs.title: Front End Developer Internship at Elaniin
bullets: Analysis and estimation of requirement and development in SPA
Bringing mock-ups to life using HTML, CSS, JavaScript with CRM HubSpot and others CRM
Maintenance and Add-ons of websites created in Wordpress or with technologies such as: NuxtJS(VueJS) and ReactJS
Deploy SPA made in React JS to servers

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: In this section, you'll find a selection of the projects I've developed as part of my work as a web developer. Each project reflects my focus on creating efficient, scalable applications with an excellent user experience. From intuitive interfaces to complete backend solutions, here you can explore how to transform ideas into functional products.
